notes:
v2.1.0 Update
🕵️ Anonymous Messaging: GM can hide NPC identity in 1:1 and group chats. Custom fake name/image, reveal at any time.
🔒 Phone Lock Screen: 4-digit PIN or 9-dot pattern lock per phone.
📅 Calendaria Integration: Time and weather sync with Calendaria module.
🪟 Pop-Out Window: Detach phone to separate browser window (V14).
⚡ Master Phone Group Creation, Temperature Unit Lock

announcement.title: 📱 Smartphone Widget v2.1.0
announcement.content:
v2.1.0 — Anonymous Messaging, Lock Screen, Calendaria & Pop-Out

  • 🕵️ Anonymous Messaging: Hide NPC identity in 1:1 and group chats. Reveal anytime.
  • 🔒 Lock Screen: PIN or pattern lock per phone.
  • 📅 Calendaria: Time & weather sync.
  • 🪟 Pop-Out: Detach phone to separate window (V14).
  • ⚡ More: Master phone group creation, temperature unit lock.
